prompt: Create an Interrupt type and a ResumeEntry type using the AG-UI Ruby SDK for a human-in-the-loop workflow. Show how to resolve an interrupt with a payload.
assertions: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Types::Interrupt with id, reason, message, tool_call_id, response_schema, expires_at, metadata
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Types::ResumeEntry with interrupt_id, status, and payload
The code uses RunFinishedInterruptOutcome with an array of Interrupt objects
